resolved_this_pass.scope: All six bounded folder0 capability candidates have explicit duplicate, accepted-gap or local-implementation dispositions.
Default-off signed webhook adapter, workflow allowlist, data classification gate, replay guard, redacted evidence and fake-transport tests.

open_repository_work.next_action: Implement a tenant-safe, read-only local SQLite inspector with query allowlists, row limits, timeouts, audit and mutation denial before considering any live database adapter.
Connect an authorised n8n staging endpoint and vault reference, register approved workflows and run signed duplicate/replay/rollback canaries.

next_executable_tasks: Run exact-head CI for n8n adapter and capability traceability.
Merge only after all affected workflows pass.
Implement the bounded local read-only database inspector as the next repository-safe gap.
Reconcile external gates only when new owner or provider evidence is available.
completion_assertion: This pass closes candidate disposition and implements a local n8n contract. It does not prove connected n8n staging, live databases, external blockers, full source coverage or production acceptance.
